content:
# Best AI Video Tools for TikTok Creators in 2026

TikTok creators know that consistency and quality are key to growing your following. AI video tools can help you create amazing content faster than ever!

Check out our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: The TikTok Creator's Best Friend

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] is perfect for TikTok creators who need a simple yet powerful video editor.

It offers auto-captions, templates, and AI-powered editing features specifically designed for social media.

### Why VEED for TikTok?
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for TikTok accessibility and reach
- **TikTok templates**: Pre-made templates that fit TikTok's format
- **Text-to-speech**: Great for voiceovers when you don't want to record

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Turn Scripts into TikTok Videos

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] excels at converting text into engaging video content.

Perfect for turning blog posts, scripts, or even tweets into TikTok-ready videos.

### Pictory for TikTok
- **Text-to-video**: Convert your ideas into videos instantly
- **AI voiceovers**: Professional-sounding voices in multiple languages
- **Auto-editing**: Cuts down editing time dramatically

---

## Comparison Table

| Tool | Best For | Price | Free Plan |
|------|----------|-------|-----------|
| [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] | Quick editing & captions | $12/mo | Yes (limited) |
| [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] | Text-to-video conversion | $19/mo | Yes (3 videos) |
| [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] | Advanced AI effects | $12/mo | Yes (limited) |

---

## Our Recommendations

- **Beginners**: Start with [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] free plan
- **Content repurposing**: Use [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] to turn text into videos
- **Advanced creators**: Try [[link:/tools/9|Runway]] for amazing AI effects

Ready to create viral TikTok videos? Give these tools a try!

For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-ai-video-tools-2026-pictory-veed|Best AI Video Tools 2026]]
